description: Command and scenario contract for the pibo debug pty command family, CLI options, scenario schema, and validation errors.

userStories.title: Register pibo debug pty command group
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a discoverable pibo debug pty command group so that PTY validation has a standard entry point.
acceptanceCriteria: Register pibo debug pty in the existing CLI command registry
Add pibo debug pty --help output that lists run, scenario, and list-scenarios
The command group exits with a clear help or usage message when no subcommand is provided
Focused CLI parser tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add run subcommand options
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want pibo debug pty run to accept terminal, timeout, artifact, assertion, target, and provider options so that ad hoc PTY checks can be configured from the CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: Add pibo debug pty run -- <command...> option parsing
Support rows, cols, timeout-ms, idle-timeout-ms, artifact-dir, docker-worker, workdir, real-provider, max-iterations, input-delay-ms, expect, and reject options
Normalize run options into the shared PTY scenario structure
Focused option parsing tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Define scenario schema and validation
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I want declarative scenario files so that PTY flows can be reviewed and repeated across environments.
acceptanceCriteria: Define scenario types/schema for command, cwd/workdir, env, rows, cols, timeoutMs, idleTimeoutMs, inputDelayMs, providerMode, maxIterations, artifactDir, steps, expect, and reject
Support step types waitFor, typeText, writeBytes, press, sleepMs, expect, and reject
Reject invalid provider modes, missing command arrays, invalid step shapes, invalid timeouts, and malformed artifact settings
Schema validation errors include the field path and expected shape
Focused schema validation tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add scenario and list-scenarios subcommands
userStories.description: As an implementation agent, I want pibo debug pty scenario and list-scenarios so that reusable PTY scenarios can be loaded and discovered.
acceptanceCriteria: Add pibo debug pty scenario <file> that loads and validates JSON scenario files before execution
Add pibo debug pty list-scenarios that lists available built-in or documented scenarios and exits successfully when none exist
Scenario command supports CLI option overrides where defined by the spec
Focused command tests pass
Typecheck passes
